title: Amaranthium (Jest)
description:
Just something I have been working on, adds a small amount of content, nothing special,
BTW, Raids are now a little more challenging with the amount of mobs that spawn.
body:
Hello, I would like to say that I've been using MCreator to make a mod.
        
           
 This mod adds the following:
 1. **More mobs**:
   Some Mobs are added to this mod as Raid Bosses, Raid Mobs, Regular Bosses, Rarer Mobs, and for an exra challenge.

 2. **More Content**:
   Adds a variety of Blocks, Armours, Weapons, a Shield, a Potion, Consumables and Ingredients. 
 3. **More Biomes**:
    Adds the following Biomes;
            1. **_Nullspace_**, a nearly entirely black biome that has 2 new blocks, Voidstone and Voidirt.
          2. **_Uniquea_**, a biome made for my sister, adding concentrated pixie essence -a block that changes your gravity from true to false for a random amount of time- and feywood -a wood that is yellowish in colour- as well as an equivelant to stone called Unistone.            3. **_The Chaos Realm_**, a biome to trap your friends in, with Soulsand on top of Ice as tha main fillers of the biome.
           4. _**"Hibgoulber"** The Land of Sweets_, Just a funny little Biome, its point? to add a lot of sweet blocks in one place (so I guess you could say that it's a peice of _Cake_).
            5. _**The Dream Realm**_, The realm of the dreaming, can only enter with a Dreamcaster with a Right-Click in the Overworld, Right-Click in the Dream Realm to go back to the Overworld.

 4. **_Dev/Co-Dev/Collab Items_**, There are a few Items that are harder to obtain, these Items have higher damage and effects.

 5. **_Oddities_** Some Items Have text that looks like an enchantment/curse, this is give off the effect that they are already enchanted, as to do with their effects, here are the current oddities:
    1. **Reach**, Increases the reach of the Item.
    2. **Curse of Detrification**, Shoots a Blood Ball but you (are supposed to) take 1-15 damage.
    3. **Marksman**, Applies the 'Marked' effect (Applies Glowing III + Bad Omen).
    4. **Conductive**, Summons lightning one second after an entity is hit.
    5. **Blazing**, Gives fire resistance and ignites hit enemies
    6. **Essence of Darkness**, you can use the item to sacrifice health to shoot fireballs.
    7. **Sudden Death**, weapon has a 15% to deal over 3000 damage.
 
 6. This mod adds 2 Key binds, The 'Necronuim Armour Teleport', and The 'Shoot Resentful Ghost' the 'Shoot Resentful Ghost' requires one of the following chestplates to be worn: 
             1. Wizard Robes,
             2. Soul Catcher,
             3. Glass Chestplate.
 
 

 This mod is mainly focused on the Fun and Chaotic aspects of Projectiles, Weapons, and Armours. 
 I had a lot of fun making this mod, and I do plan to get some allies of mine to help me make some sequals.

Official Sequels:
1. Amaranthium (Magic: Hemomancy)
2. Amaranthium (Magic: Conjuration)
3. Amaranthium (Magic: Illusory)
4. Amaranthium (Quai)
5. Amaranthium (Redstone Dirt)
6. Amaranthium (Time to Gear Up)
7. Amaranthium (Ihla)
8. Amaranthium (Boom)
9. Amaranth
10. Amaranthium (Valentines)
11. Amaranthium (The Hunt Ensues)



Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.
    I hope you enjoy.
